name: quasi
description: Academic research toolkit — search, download, extract, analyze, synthesize

cookiecloud_server.title: CookieCloud server URL
cookiecloud_server.description: Self-hosted CookieCloud endpoint (https://github.com/easychen/CookieCloud), e.g. https://cookiecloud.example.com. Leave empty to disable EZProxy entirely — papers will only resolve via OA / Sci-Hub / Wayback.

cookiecloud_uuid.title: CookieCloud user key (UUID)
cookiecloud_uuid.description: The 'user KEY' set in the CookieCloud Chrome extension.

cookiecloud_password.title: CookieCloud E2E password
cookiecloud_password.description: End-to-end encryption password set in the CookieCloud Chrome extension. Stored in the system keychain.

cookiecloud_ezproxy_domain.title: EZProxy cookie domain
cookiecloud_ezproxy_domain.description: Domain where the EZProxy auth cookie is set, e.g. '.idm.oclc.org'. Only cookies on this exact domain are kept; tracking cookies on rewritten publisher subdomains are dropped.

cookiecloud_login_url.title: EZProxy login URL prefix
cookiecloud_login_url.description: EZProxy login redirector that DOIs are wrapped through. Example: https://login.eux.idm.oclc.org/login?url= (OCLC-hosted) or your institution's equivalent.
